content:
# Best AI Writing Tools for SEO Content in 2026

SEO content requires more than good writing — you need to optimize for search engines. AI tools make it easier!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: SEO-Optimized Content

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] includes SEO-optimized templates for articles that rank.

### Rytr for SEO Writing
- **SEO templates**: Built for search optimization
- **Keyword integration**: Natural keyword placement
- **Meta descriptions**: Generate compelling snippets

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## [[link:/tools/18|Jasper]]: Enterprise SEO Tools

[[link:/tools/18|Jasper]] offers advanced SEO features for serious content marketers.

### Jasper for SEO
- **SEO mode**: Built-in optimization suggestions
- **Surfer SEO integration**: Connect with external SEO tools
- **Content templates**: SEO-specific formats
